metadata.title: Extracanonical Jewish and Christian Texts Database
metadata.scope: Major Jewish, Christian, Jewish-Christian, Gnostic, Samaritan, Mandaean, and related ancient religious texts/documents influential or circulated but outside the later rabbinic Tanakh and/or traditional 27-book Protestant New Testament canon, with notes for Catholic/Orthodox/Ethiopian variations.
metadata.caveat: Living scholarly catalog. Entry-level details are normalized from v0.1 and partly enriched; not a claim of exhaustive coverage.
metadata.translation_policy: The project tracks the best scholarly English translation for each text and provides project text slots for future search/AI ingestion. Full-text hosting requires rights clearance or public-domain/open-license confirmation per text.
